name: Commercial Mathematics
description: GST (Goods and Services Tax), Banking (Recurring Deposit Accounts), and Shares and Dividends.

name: Algebra: Quadratic Equations
description: Solving quadratic equations, nature of roots, and solving simple word problems.

name: Algebra: Factorisation
description: Factor Theorem and Remainder Theorem for cubic/higher polynomials.

name: Algebra: Matrices
description: Order, addition, subtraction, and multiplication of 2x2 matrices.

name: Algebra: AP & GP
description: Arithmetic Progression (AP) and Geometric Progression (GP) - finding nth term and sum of terms.

name: Algebra: Coordinate Geometry
description: Reflection, section formula, midpoint formula, and equation of a straight line.

name: Algebra: Linear Inequations
description: Linear inequations in one variable and representation of solution on number line.

name: Geometry: Circles & Tangents
description: Properties of circle theorems, chord properties, cyclic properties, and tangent properties.

name: Geometry: Similarity & Loci
description: Similarity properties, scale factor, and loci theorems.

name: Mensuration
description: Surface area and volume of Cylinder, Cone, and Sphere (including combination of solids).

name: Statistics
description: Computation of Mean, Median, Mode, Ogives, and Histograms.

name: Probability
description: Simple problems on single events, coins, dice, and cards.
